dialogText1:
If we're going to have a chance at breaking away from Sela and the Tal Shiar, we need allies.

There are a lot of little settlements like yours out there. We're in contact with some of them, but we're always reaching out to try to make new alliances.

I've heard that a group of Romulans has taken up residence in a Suliban Helix in the Beta Quadrant. I'd like you to visit them. Feel them out, help them if you can, but most of all, find out if they would be willing to join D'Tan in his search for a new homeworld.
dialogText2: <font style="Mission_Info">Proceed to the Suliban Helix System in the Beta Quadrant and attempt to contact the Romulan colonists living there.</font>

text: Acquired mission: The Helix
rawLine: [837827176,20260719T214616,0,@,@,,,Mission]Acquired mission: The Helix

speaker: Tovan Khev
text: Neral, we've arrived at the Helix but we're not the only ship here.
rawLine: [837827258,20260719T214738,0,Tovan Khev@,@,,,NPC]Neral, we've arrived at the Helix but we're not the only ship here.

triggerText: Neral, we've arrived at the Helix but we're not the only ship here.

dialogText1:
Neral, we've arrived at the Helix but we're not the only ship here.

A Tal Shiar warbird is approaching from the direction of the primary structure. They haven't raised shields yet, but their weapons are online.

Wait ... they're hailing us.

Your orders?

speaker: Tovan Khev
text: Ship on main viewer.
rawLine: [837827273,20260719T214753,0,Tovan Khev@,@,,,NPC]Ship on main viewer.

dialogText1:
Ship on main viewer.

It's a T'varo Light Warbird, designation I.R.W. Sharrdar.

They could be Tal Shiar.

speaker: Commander Talek
text: To the person in command of the R.R.W. explicit profanities, be advised that you are in violation of Tal Shiar security order 63-R.
rawLine: [837827279,20260719T214759,0,Commander Talek@,@,,,NPC]To the person in command of the R.R.W. explicit profanities, be advised that you are in violation of Tal Shiar security order 63-R.

dialogText1:
To the person in command of the R.R.W. explicit profanities, be advised that you are in violation of Tal Shiar security order 63-R.

Your vessel is operating in this area without authorization. Identify yourself immediately or your actions will be considered hostile.

You don't want that kind of trouble.

options.displayString: What authority could you possibly have out here?

speaker: Commander Talek
text: The Tal Shiar has the authority to track down terrorists that threaten the Romulan Star Empire, no matter where they try to hide.
rawLine: [837827282,20260719T214802,0,Commander Talek@,@,,,NPC]The Tal Shiar has the authority to track down terrorists that threaten the Romulan Star Empire, no matter where they try to hide.

selectedChoice: What authority could you possibly have out here?

dialogText1:
The Tal Shiar has the authority to track down terrorists that threaten the Romulan Star Empire, no matter where they try to hide.

And don't bother with deception. Our records indicate a warbird with your ship's designation was decommissioned years ago. We've already identified you as Kareth Neral.

Stealing military property is a serious crime. Care to explain, "Commander"?
lastResponseDisplayString: What authority could you possibly have out here?

text: The Suliban famously have many secret information resources. Maybe they have some files on the Iconians.
rawLine: [837827294,20260719T214814,0,@,@,,,Mission]The Suliban famously have many secret information resources. Maybe they have some files on the Iconians.

objectives.displayText: ∆ Recover Iconian Intel from the Helix
objectives.rawDisplayText: <font style=Mission_Recruit>∆</font> Recover Iconian Intel from the Helix

speaker: Kaiyan
text: To the R.R.W. explicit profanities.
rawLine: [837827306,20260719T214826,0,Kaiyan@,@,,,NPC]To the R.R.W. explicit profanities.

dialogText1:
To the R.R.W. explicit profanities. We plead for mercy.

There are only civilians on the Helix. We don't have much more than we can scavenge from the cell ships.

As we told the other Tal Shiar, there are no terrorists here. The Cabal are long gone.

Take whatever scrap you need, but please, stop taking our people!

options.displayString: Tell me more about the Helix.
We're not here to rob you.

speaker: Kaiyan
text: The Helix originally had hundreds of connected cell ships that could support up to 3,000 people.
rawLine: [837827308,20260719T214828,0,Kaiyan@,@,,,NPC]The Helix originally had hundreds of connected cell ships that could support up to 3,000 people.

selectedChoice: Tell me more about the Helix.

dialogText1:
The Helix originally had hundreds of connected cell ships that could support up to 3,000 people.

It and other similar stations were constructed after the destruction of our homeworld. This Helix was abandoned decades ago for unknown reasons.

My people are nomadic, and so we've returned to salvage what we can. So far, we've survived by trading scrap from the station for supplies.
lastResponseDisplayString: Tell me more about the Helix.

speaker: Kaiyan
text: To the R.R.W. explicit profanities.
rawLine: [837827309,20260719T214829,0,Kaiyan@,@,,,NPC]To the R.R.W. explicit profanities.

dialogText1:
To the R.R.W. explicit profanities. We plead for mercy.

There are only civilians on the Helix. We don't have much more than we can scavenge from the cell ships.

As we told the other Tal Shiar, there are no terrorists here. The Cabal are long gone.

Take whatever scrap you need, but please, stop taking our people!

options.displayString: Tell me more about the Helix.
We're not here to rob you.

speaker: Kaiyan
text: Then why are you here?
rawLine: [837827310,20260719T214830,0,Kaiyan@,@,,,NPC]Then why are you here?

selectedChoice: We're not here to rob you.

dialogText1:
Then why are you here?

We don't have much to trade, and we don't want any trouble.
lastResponseDisplayString: We're not here to rob you.

speaker: Kaiyan
text: There are a few Romulan refugees hiding within the Helix. They said they needed temporary shelter and would be leaving soon. We meant no harm.
rawLine: [837827311,20260719T214831,0,Kaiyan@,@,,,NPC]There are a few Romulan refugees hiding within the Helix. They said they needed temporary shelter and would be leaving soon. We meant no harm.

dialogText1:
There are a few Romulan refugees hiding within the Helix. They said they needed temporary shelter and would be leaving soon. We meant no harm.

How were we to know that they are wanted terrorists?

Please, just take them with you and go.

options.displayString: We're not with the Tal Shiar.

speaker: Kaiyan
text: Your actions speak for your true goals.
rawLine: [837827312,20260719T214832,0,Kaiyan@,@,,,NPC]Your actions speak for your true goals.

selectedChoice: We're not with the Tal Shiar.

dialogText1:
Your actions speak for your true goals.

If you help us by repairing the Helix Arm Structures, then we'll help you to get the refugees to your ship.

But hurry. We're in jeopardy every moment you remain here.

Reposition Helix Arm Structures.
lastResponseDisplayString: We're not with the Tal Shiar.

objectives.displayText: ∆ Recover Iconian Intel from the Helix
objectives.rawDisplayText: <font style=Mission_Recruit>∆</font> Recover Iconian Intel from the Helix

objectives.displayText: ∆ Recover Iconian Intel from the Helix
objectives.rawDisplayText: <font style=Mission_Recruit>∆</font> Recover Iconian Intel from the Helix

text: More Tal Shiar have entered the system. Please help us!
rawLine: [837827316,20260719T214836,0,@,@,,,Mission]More Tal Shiar have entered the system. Please help us!

text: For the Empire!
One more to go. As soon as Delta is connected, we can negotiate a transfer.
rawLine: [837827328,20260719T214848,0,@,@,,,Mission]One more to go. As soon as Delta is connected, we can negotiate a transfer.

objectives.displayText: ∆ Recover Iconian Intel from the Helix
objectives.rawDisplayText: <font style=Mission_Recruit>∆</font> Recover Iconian Intel from the Helix

speaker: Subcommander Kail
text: The Suliban have a great deal of information provided to them during the Temporal Cold War, but not much on the Iconians. By the 28th century, the Iconians have mostly disappeared from history. I wonder where they went?
rawLine: [837827334,20260719T214854,0,Subcommander Kail@,@,,,NPC]The Suliban have a great deal of information provided to them during the Temporal Cold War, but not much on the Iconians. By the 28th century, the Iconians have mostly disappeared from history. I wonder where they went?

text: Suliban files about the Iconians have been downloaded.
rawLine: [837827334,20260719T214854,0,@,@,,,Mission]Suliban files about the Iconians have been downloaded.

dialogText1: The Suliban have a great deal of information provided to them during the Temporal Cold War, but not much on the Iconians. By the 28th century, the Iconians have mostly disappeared from history. I wonder where they went?

objectives.displayText: ∆ Recover Iconian Intel from the Helix
objectives.rawDisplayText: <font style=Mission_Recruit>∆</font> Recover Iconian Intel from the Helix

text: More Tal Shiar ships are entering the area!
rawLine: [837827346,20260719T214906,0,@,@,,,Mission]More Tal Shiar ships are entering the area!

objectives.displayText: ∆ Recover Iconian Intel from the Helix
objectives.rawDisplayText: <font style=Mission_Recruit>∆</font> Recover Iconian Intel from the Helix

text: You'll die for your crimes, rebel!
rawLine: [837827349,20260719T214909,0,@,@,,,Mission]You'll die for your crimes, rebel!

objectives.displayText: ∆ Recover Iconian Intel from the Helix
objectives.rawDisplayText: <font style=Mission_Recruit>∆</font> Recover Iconian Intel from the Helix

speaker: Kaiyan
text: Now that the arms are restored, we've located the refugees. They are being moved to a centralized location so you can get a transporter lock.
rawLine: [837827364,20260719T214924,0,Kaiyan@,@,,,NPC]Now that the arms are restored, we've located the refugees. They are being moved to a centralized location so you can get a transporter lock.

dialogText1:
Now that the arms are restored, we've located the refugees. They are being moved to a centralized location so you can get a transporter lock.

We've explained the situation to them, but a representative for the group is asking to speak with you.

speaker: Satra
text: Kaiyan informs me that we're being transported to your vessel.
rawLine: [837827366,20260719T214926,0,Satra@,@,,,NPC]Kaiyan informs me that we're being transported to your vessel.

dialogText1:
Kaiyan informs me that we're being transported to your vessel.

We realize that we can't stay on the Helix, but we have no intention of being forced into servitude.

The Tal Shiar already destroyed our home. All we want is for you to leave us on an uninhabited world or someplace we can hide and try to rebuild our lives.

options.displayString: You'll be safe with D'Tan. You have my word.

speaker: Satra
text: We've heard of D'Tan.

selectedChoice: You'll be safe with D'Tan. You have my word.

dialogText1:
We've heard of D'Tan.

We've also heard rumors that he's plotting a revolt against the Tal Shiar.

Going to him sounds more dangerous than staying here.
lastResponseDisplayString: You'll be safe with D'Tan. You have my word.

options.displayString: Would you rather stay and be captured?

speaker: Satra
text: I know I'm out of options, Admiral. That doesn't mean I have to like it.
rawLine: [837827367,20260719T214927,0,Satra@,@,,,NPC]I know I'm out of options, Admiral. That doesn't mean I have to like it.

selectedChoice: Would you rather stay and be captured?

dialogText1:
I know I'm out of options, Admiral. That doesn't mean I have to like it.

I don't know why the Tal Shiar are abducting our families, but we can't afford to lose anyone else.

How about I make you a deal? You personally guarantee that my friends will be safe at D'Tan's fleet, and I'll work for you.
lastResponseDisplayString: Would you rather stay and be captured?

speaker: Satra
text: I've served as a science officer on multiple civilian vessels. I can help you.
rawLine: [837827368,20260719T214928,0,Satra@,@,,,NPC]I've served as a science officer on multiple civilian vessels. I can help you.

dialogText1:
I've served as a science officer on multiple civilian vessels. I can help you.

I just ... I can't run anymore. If I need to fight the Tal Shiar to keep my friends safe, that's what I'll do.

options.displayString: Is there a woman named Rinna Khev in your group?

speaker: Satra
text: Rinna Khev? No, I don't know anyone by that name.
rawLine: [837827370,20260719T214930,0,Satra@,@,,,NPC]Rinna Khev? No, I don't know anyone by that name.

selectedChoice: Is there a woman named Rinna Khev in your group?

dialogText1: Rinna Khev? No, I don't know anyone by that name.
lastResponseDisplayString: Is there a woman named Rinna Khev in your group?

options.displayString: Thank you. Prepare to beam aboard.

objectives.displayText: ∆ Recover Iconian Intel from the Helix
objectives.rawDisplayText: <font style=Mission_Recruit>∆</font> Recover Iconian Intel from the Helix

objectives.displayText: ∆ Recover Iconian Intel from the Helix
objectives.rawDisplayText: <font style=Mission_Recruit>∆</font> Recover Iconian Intel from the Helix

speaker: Tovan Khev
text: All the refugees are aboard, but there's more trouble.
rawLine: [837827378,20260719T214938,0,Tovan Khev@,@,,,NPC]All the refugees are aboard, but there's more trouble.

dialogText1:
All the refugees are aboard, but there's more trouble.

A Tal Shiar battleship, the I.R.W. Koval, has entered the system.

They're hailing us, and they're asking for you by name.

Remember, they're not here to be friends.

speaker: Commander Moralok
text: Admiral Neral, you are ordered to stand down.
rawLine: [837827385,20260719T214945,0,Commander Moralok@,@,,,NPC]Admiral Neral, you are ordered to stand down.

dialogText1:
Admiral Neral, you are ordered to stand down.

You are wanted for questioning by the Tal Shiar.

Lower your shields and surrender your vessel and crew, or prepare to face the consequences.

options.displayString: Never. The Tal Shiar are corrupt.

speaker: Commander Moralok
text: Your actions speak for themselves.
rawLine: [837827387,20260719T214947,0,Commander Moralok@,@,,,NPC]Your actions speak for themselves.

selectedChoice: Never. The Tal Shiar are corrupt.

dialogText1:
Your actions speak for themselves.

You'll answer for the destruction you've caused today.

Remember that you were given a chance to surrender.
lastResponseDisplayString: Never. The Tal Shiar are corrupt.

options.displayString: Close the channel. Power to shields.

text: I recommend using our cloaking device to get close enough for a sneak attack.
rawLine: [837827389,20260719T214949,0,@,@,,,Mission]I recommend using our cloaking device to get close enough for a sneak attack.

speaker: Kaiyan
text: Thank you for taking the refugees, Admiral.
rawLine: [837827412,20260719T215012,0,Kaiyan@,@,,,NPC]Thank you for taking the refugees, Admiral.

dialogText1:
Thank you for taking the refugees, Admiral.

Tell them we're sorry. We simply have no way to protect them. Hopefully they'll find refuge with your fleet.

Our best hope now is to cooperate with the Tal Shiar and tell them that you have taken the refugees.

options.displayString: Do what you have to do.

speaker: Kaiyan
text: We can't offer much, but I'll tell other Suliban that D'Tan's fleet is standing up to the Tal Shiar.
rawLine: [837827414,20260719T215014,0,Kaiyan@,@,,,NPC]We can't offer much, but I'll tell other Suliban that D'Tan's fleet is standing up to the Tal Shiar.

selectedChoice: Do what you have to do.

dialogText1:
We can't offer much, but I'll tell other Suliban that D'Tan's fleet is standing up to the Tal Shiar.

I'm also sending you the contact for a friendly local trader in case you need salvage or have goods to sell.

But please ... keep our involvement discreet.

And please go -- leave now, before more Tal Shiar arrive.
lastResponseDisplayString: Do what you have to do.

speaker: Tovan Khev
text: Kaiyan closed the channel.
rawLine: [837827416,20260719T215016,0,Tovan Khev@,@,,,NPC]Kaiyan closed the channel.

dialogText1:
Kaiyan closed the channel.

He's right. They'll be lucky if the Tal Shiar let them live.

We should leave and report back to Temer. Some of the refugees we brought aboard may have starship experience. If we're expecting more trouble, we'll need some help on the bridge.

Leave the system.

text: "The Helix" complete!

speaker: Commander Temer
text: We'll give the refugees a good home here. They'll be safe, and we'll do all we can to help them.
rawLine: [837827430,20260719T215030,0,Commander Temer@,@,,,NPC]We'll give the refugees a good home here. They'll be safe, and we'll do all we can to help them.

triggerText: We'll give the refugees a good home here. They'll be safe, and we'll do all we can to help them.

dialogText1:
We'll give the refugees a good home here. They'll be safe, and we'll do all we can to help them.

This is just the start, Admiral. We won't stop until we're on a new world -- one of our own.

text: Resolved mission "The Helix".
rawLine: [837827442,20260719T215042,0,@,@,,,Mission]Resolved mission "The Helix".
